title: helianthus agrestis
intro: Helianthus agrestis, also known as the rough sunflower or prairie sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and other minor injuries. The health benefits of Helianthus agrestis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
